---
title: 'Location Sketch: Ashland, Oregon'
date: '2014-10-28T01:50:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'It''s Author Fun'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5889758707472288845'
blogger_filename: '/2014/10/location-sketch-ashland-oregon.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/It_s Author Fun/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Location Sketch'
  - 'White Noise'
---

<div class="WordSection1">  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">Colonel Theron Ashlund, USAF was the old Ash.<o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">Now he was Professor Ashlund, Ph.D. Dean of the school for Military Science at Southern Oregon University (SOU), Ashland Oregon. More on Ash:  <a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/2014/05/flashbacks.html">http://authorfun.blogspot.com/2014/05/flashbacks.html</a><o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <div style="mso-element:para-border-div;border:none;border-bottom:solid windowtext 1.0pt;padding:0in 0in 1.0pt 0in">  <p class="MsoNormal" style="border:none;padding:0in"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  </div>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <h2><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland,_Oregon"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;;font-weight:normal">Ashland, Oregon</span></a><o:p></o:p></h2>  <p class="MsoNormal"><b><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></b></p>  <h2>Story Overview:<o:p></o:p></h2>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent:-.25in;mso-list:l2 level1 lfo1"><![if !supportLists]><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:Symbol"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">Â·<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;  </span></span></span><![endif]><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">Ash owns a two story cabin in the mountains. Back balcony overlooks the hills and lake, front window overlooks the town. He has a hammock on the back balcony.  <o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent:-.25in;mso-list:l2 level1 lfo1"><![if !supportLists]><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:Symbol"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">Â·<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;  </span></span></span><![endif]><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">Ash has a favorite coffee shop he visits frequently.<o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent:-.25in;mso-list:l2 level1 lfo1"><![if !supportLists]><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:Symbol"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">Â·<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;  </span></span></span><![endif]><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">Ash is a professor at SOU.<o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent:-.25in;mso-list:l2 level1 lfo1"><![if !supportLists]><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:Symbol"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">Â·<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;  </span></span></span><![endif]><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">Ash keeps to himself, makes very few friends, and his home is quite empty, except for essentials. Nobody visits.  <o:p></o:p></span></p>  <h2>Wiki for Ashland OR<o:p></o:p></h2>  <p style="margin-left:.5in"><b><span lang="EN" style="font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">Ashland</span></b><span lang="EN" style="font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"> is a city in  <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jackson_County,_Oregon" title="Jackson County, Oregon">  Jackson County</a>, in the <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/U.S._state" title="U.S. state">  State</a> of <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oregon" title="Oregon">Oregon</a>. It lies along  <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Interstate_5_in_Oregon" title="Interstate 5 in Oregon">  Interstate 5</a> slightly north of the <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/California" title="California">  California</a> border and near the south end of the <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bear_Creek_(Rogue_River)" title="Bear Creek (Rogue River)">  Bear Creek</a> Valley, an arm of the <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rogue_Valley" title="Rogue Valley">  Rogue Valley</a>. As of July 1, 2013, the city's population was estimated to be 20,713.<sup id="cite_ref-2013_Pop_Estimate_5-1"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland,_Oregon#cite_note-2013_Pop_Estimate-5">[5]</a></sup><o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p style="margin-left:.5in"><span lang="EN" style="font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">The city is the home of  <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Southern_Oregon_University" title="Southern Oregon University">  Southern Oregon University</a> (SOU) and the <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oregon_Shakespeare_Festival" title="Oregon Shakespeare Festival">  Oregon Shakespeare Festival</a> (OSF). These are important to Ashland's economy, which also depends on restaurants, galleries, and retail stores that cater to playgoers and other visitors.  <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lithia_Park" title="Lithia Park">Lithia Park</a> along  <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland_Creek" title="Ashland Creek">Ashland Creek</a>, historic buildings, and a paved intercity bike trail provide additional tourist attractions.<o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p style="margin-left:.5in"><span lang="EN" style="font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">Ashland, originally called  <i>Ashland Mills</i>, was named after <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland_County,_Ohio" title="Ashland County, Ohio">  Ashland County, Ohio</a>, the original home of founder <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abel_Helman" title="Abel Helman">  Abel Helman</a>, and secondarily for <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland,_Kentucky" title="Ashland, Kentucky">  Ashland, Kentucky</a>, where other founders had family connections. Ashland has a  <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mayor-council_government" title="Mayor-council government">  mayor-council government</a> assisted by citizen committees. Historically, its liberal politics have differed, often sharply, with much of the rest of southwest Oregon.<o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p style="margin-left:.5in"><span lang="EN" style="font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">Ashland is at 1,949 feet (594&nbsp;m) above sea level<sup id="cite_ref-gnis_3-2"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland,_Oregon#cite_note-gnis-3">[3]</a></sup> in the foothills   of the Siskiyou and <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cascade_Range" title="Cascade Range">  Cascade</a> ranges, about 15 miles (24&nbsp;km) north of the <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/California" title="California">  California</a> border on <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Interstate_5_in_Oregon" title="Interstate 5 in Oregon">  Interstate 5</a> (I-5).<sup id="cite_ref-19"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland,_Oregon#cite_note-19">[19]</a></sup> About 10 miles (16&nbsp;km) south of Ashland and 5 miles (8&nbsp;km) north of the California border is  <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Siskiyou_Summit" title="Siskiyou Summit">Siskiyou Summit</a>, which at 4,310 feet (1,310&nbsp;m) is the highest point on I-5.<sup id="cite_ref-20"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland,_Oregon#cite_note-20">[20]</a></sup>   Ashland is about 12 miles (19&nbsp;km) south of <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Medford,_Oregon" title="Medford, Oregon">  Medford</a> and about 300 miles (480&nbsp;km) south of Portland.<sup id="cite_ref-Community_Profile_21-0"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland,_Oregon#cite_note-Community_Profile-21">[21]</a></sup> According to the  <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/United_States_Census_Bureau" title="United States Census Bureau">  United States Census Bureau</a>, the city has a total area of about 6.6 square miles (17.1&nbsp;km<sup>2</sup>), all land.<sup id="cite_ref-Gazetteer_files_2-1"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland,_Oregon#cite_note-Gazetteer_files-2">[2]</a></sup><o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <h2>Climate:<o:p></o:p></h2>  <p style="margin-left:.5in"><span lang="EN" style="font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">Although the mountain peaks in this zone receive up to 120 inches (3,000&nbsp;mm) of precipitation a year, the urban areas and the valleys in which they lie generally get 20 inches   (510&nbsp;mm) or less. This valley climate is particularly good for growing fruit, especially pears, and for producing other crops and farm goods such as hay, grain, poultry, and beef.<sup id="cite_ref-23"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland,_Oregon#cite_note-23">[23]</a></sup><o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p style="margin-left:.5in"><span lang="EN" style="font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">Cloud cover in nearby Medford varies from an average of 21&nbsp;percent in July to 86&nbsp;percent in December.<sup id="cite_ref-24"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland,_Oregon#cite_note-24">[24]</a></sup>   On average, precipitation falls in Ashland on 114 days each year and totals about 20 inches (510&nbsp;mm).<sup id="cite_ref-NOAA_25-0"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland,_Oregon#cite_note-NOAA-25">[25]</a></sup> The average annual snowfall is only 1.4   inches (3.6&nbsp;cm).<sup id="cite_ref-NOAA_25-1"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland,_Oregon#cite_note-NOAA-25">[25]</a></sup> The average relative humidity, measured at 4 p.m. daily, is 47&nbsp;percent in Medford, varying from 26&nbsp;percent in July to 76&nbsp;percent   in December.<sup id="cite_ref-26"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland,_Oregon#cite_note-26">[26]</a></sup><o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p style="margin-left:.5in"><span lang="EN" style="font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">The coolest month is December, with an average high temperature of 47&nbsp;Â°F (8&nbsp;Â°C), and the warmest month is July, with an average high of about 88&nbsp;Â°F (31&nbsp;Â°C).<sup id="cite_ref-NOAA_25-2"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland,_Oregon#cite_note-NOAA-25">[25]</a></sup>   The highest temperature ever recorded in Ashland was 108&nbsp;Â°F (42&nbsp;Â°C), observed in August 1981, and the record low of âˆ’4&nbsp;Â°F (âˆ’20&nbsp;Â°C) occurred in December 1972.<sup id="cite_ref-WeatherChannel_27-0"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland,_Oregon#cite_note-WeatherChannel-27">[27]</a></sup><o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image003-726592-e3da47b61836.jpg"><img src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image003-726592-e5e11daed857.jpg"  border="0" alt="" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6075063856453290754" /></a></span><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <h2>Demographics:<o:p></o:p></h2>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent:-.25in;mso-list:l0 level1 lfo2"><![if !supportLists]><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:Symbol"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">Â·<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;  </span></span></span><![endif]><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">In the  <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Census" title="Census">census</a> of 2010, there were 20,078 people, 9,409 households, and 4,542 families residing in the city.</span><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <h2>Economy:<o:p></o:p></h2>  <p style="margin-left:.5in"><span lang="EN" style="font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">Income from tourism is important to Ashland's economy. A large number of restaurants, galleries, and retail stores cater to thousands of visitors who attend plays each year at   the Oregon Shakespeare Festival. In 2011, the festival sold more than 390,000 tickets to its theater productions.<sup id="cite_ref-Chamber_34-0"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland,_Oregon#cite_note-Chamber-34">[34]</a></sup><o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p style="margin-left:.5in"><span lang="EN" style="font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">The town's largest employer is  <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Southern_Oregon_University" title="Southern Oregon University">  Southern Oregon University</a> (SOU), which has a faculty and staff of more than 750.<sup id="cite_ref-Chamber_34-1"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland,_Oregon#cite_note-Chamber-34">[34]</a></sup> In addition to the Oregon Shakespeare Festival and   the university, health-service providers make significant contributions to the economy. Businesses related to outdoor recreation, transportation, technology, and light manufacturing are also important.<sup id="cite_ref-Chamber_34-2"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland,_Oregon#cite_note-Chamber-34">[34]</a></sup>   In 2010, the Shakespeare Festival employed about 500 people, the hospital about 400, the public schools about 300, and the City of Ashland about 250.<sup id="cite_ref-AFN_Plan_35-0"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland,_Oregon#cite_note-AFN_Plan-35">[35]</a></sup>   The Bathroom Readers' Press, which produces the <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Uncle_John%27s_Bathroom_Reader" title="Uncle John's Bathroom Reader">  Uncle John's Bathroom Reader</a> books, is based in Ashland and San Diego.<sup id="cite_ref-36"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland,_Oregon#cite_note-36">[36]</a></sup>  <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Brammo" title="Brammo">Brammo</a>, specializing in battery-electric motorcycles, was based in Ashland but recently moved to  <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Talent,_Oregon" title="Talent, Oregon">Talent</a>.<sup id="cite_ref-37"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland,_Oregon#cite_note-37">[37]</a><o:p></o:p></sup></span></p>  <p style="margin-left:.5in"><span lang="EN" style="font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <h2>Points of Interest:<o:p></o:p></h2>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p style="margin-left:.5in"><span lang="EN" style="font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">The  <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/National_Fish_and_Wildlife_Forensics_Laboratory" title="National Fish and Wildlife Forensics Laboratory">  National Fish and Wildlife Forensics Laboratory</a> in Ashland is the world's only laboratory dedicated to solving crimes against wildlife. Using  <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Forensic_science" title="Forensic science">  forensic science</a>, experts at the laboratory help wildlife officers to investigate possible crimes against animals and to establish links between victims and suspects in cases that go to court.<sup id="cite_ref-44"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland,_Oregon#cite_note-44">[44]</a></sup>   The laboratory has assisted the <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/International_Criminal_Police_Organization" title="International Criminal Police Organization">  International Criminal Police Organization</a> (INTERPOL) and foreign agencies concerned with the  <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Convention_on_International_Trade_in_Endangered_Species" title="Convention on International Trade in Endangered Species">  Convention on International Trade in Endangered Species</a> (CITIES).<sup id="cite_ref-45"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland,_Oregon#cite_note-45">[45]</a></sup><o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent:-.25in;mso-list:l0 level1 lfo2"><![if !supportLists]><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:Symbol"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">Â·<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;  </span></span></span><![endif]><b><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">2.5 hours from the beach, Crescent City, CA.  <o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <h2>School:<o:p></o:p></h2>  <p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent:-.25in;mso-list:l2 level1 lfo1"><![if !supportLists]><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:Symbol"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">Â·<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;  </span></span></span><![endif]><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><a href="http://www.sou.edu/">Southern Oregon University (SOU)</a> |  <b>Outstanding</b><o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left:1.0in;text-indent:-.25in;mso-list:l2 level2 lfo1">  <![if !supportLists]><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Courier New&quot;"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">o<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">&nbsp;&nbsp;  </span></span></span><![endif]><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">RaiderUp! (Team Raiders)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  <h2>News:<o:p></o:p></h2>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">The  <i><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland_Daily_Tidings" title="Ashland Daily Tidings">Ashland Daily Tidings</a></i> is published Monday through Saturday.<o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <h2><span lang="EN">Medical:<o:p></o:p></span></h2>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span lang="EN" style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">The  <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashland_Community_Hospital_(Oregon)" title="Ashland Community Hospital (Oregon)">  Ashland Community Hospital</a> is a general medical and surgical hospital operated by the city. As of 2013, it has 36 inpatient beds</span><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p></o:p></span></p>  <div style="mso-element:para-border-div;border:none;border-bottom:solid windowtext 1.0pt;padding:0in 0in 1.0pt 0in">  <p class="MsoNormal" style="border:none;padding:0in"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  </div>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <h2>Photos:<o:p></o:p></h2>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image004-729474-0ecb0af570f5.png"><img src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image004-729474-9f7160f58531.png"  border="0" alt="" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6075063864336382434" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image005-732828-c335a9464587.jpg"><img src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image005-732828-60b3a3991987.jpg"  border="0" alt="" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6075063875289025842" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image014-735182-07406e1e2b82.jpg"><img src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image014-735182-76b5f137e90d.jpg"  border="0" alt="" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6075063890111694866" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image015-737469-60a7ab5b8da7.jpg"><img src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image015-737469-aae7bbf455e3.jpg"  border="0" alt="" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6075063899453747154" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image010-739950-cfe71de1e43c.jpg"><img src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image010-739950-68de3de2b3c6.jpg"  border="0" alt="" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6075063910706165890" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image011-742473-2c0be3adcc04.png"><img src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image011-742473-04b2adae3d4b.png"  border="0" alt="" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6075063919427224386" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image012-745397-e2fcaa4f4c5e.png"><img src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image012-745397-8b1d2e3f8847.png"  border="0" alt="" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6075063932972089330" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image013-748747-4256602e5ef9.png"><img src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image013-748747-1075ececc1a3.png"  border="0" alt="" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6075063947980414578" /></a></span><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><b><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">End Sketch and Research<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  </div>
